ogTitle: Coomoo Coomoo vs Coonabarabran: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coomoo Coomoo and Coonabarabran.
heading: Coomoo Coomoo vs Coonabarabran — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coomoo Coomoo, New South Wales and Coonabarabran, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coomoo Coomoo has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Coonabarabran (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coomoo Coomoo or Coonabarabran safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coomoo Coomoo has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Coonabarabran scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coomoo Coomoo scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Coonabarabran scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coomoo Coomoo or Coonabarabran?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coomoo Coomoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
